info.name: Wasla Backend API
info.description:
## Wasla Backend API Overview

Wasla is a station operations backend for transport flow management. It handles staff authentication, vehicle queueing, seat bookings, ticket printing, statistics, and real-time WebSocket updates across station services.

### Services in this collection
- Auth Service: login, session refresh/logout, staff management
- Queue Service: routes, vehicles, queue lifecycle, day passes
- Booking Service: seat booking, cancellation, trips, ghost bookings
- Printer Service: printer config, print queue, ticket endpoints
- Statistics Service: staff/station income and real-time stats feeds
- WebSocket Hub Service: station broadcast and connection management

### Quick start
1. Set `server_ip` (defaults to `localhost`).
2. Run **Auth Service > Login** with `staff_cin` to auto-store `token`.
3. Use protected endpoints (Authorization header is preconfigured).

This collection is synchronized with backend routes from source code and checked by `npm run docs:check`.

item.name: Cancel One Booking By Queue Entry
Get Today Trips Count By Destination
Get Today Trips Count By License Plate

request.description: Initializes local station metadata once. `public_ip` is resolved server-side: Tailscale IPv4 first (if a `tailscale*` interface exists), otherwise public IPv4 from external providers. If station config already exists, endpoint returns `200` with `already_configured: true` and an informational message.

response.name: 200 OK - Already Configured
response.body:
{
  "station_id": "st_existing",
  "name": "Sousse Station",
  "location": "Sahloul",
  "public_ip": "100.90.10.2",
  "already_configured": true,
  "message": "Station is already configured and cannot be configured again"
}

request.description: Returns station metadata and uptime. `public_ip` is resolved server-side: Tailscale IPv4 first (if a `tailscale*` interface exists), otherwise public IPv4 from external providers.

Confirms a held booking after payment success.
Response includes `vehicle_license_plate` and intentionally omits `queue_id`.

originalRequest.description:
Confirms a held booking after payment success.
Response includes `vehicle_license_plate` and intentionally omits `queue_id`.
